text: Sitting here, I am struck by the contrast between the hum of communal gathering and the solitude of thought. The first image holds a quiet curiosity; I feel like an outsider, observing a scene I am not yet a part of, wondering about the stories in that room. Entering the second scene, I am immersed in the world of ideas—R+D, innovation, the dance between humans and intelligent machines. Here, I sense excitement, anticipation, almost a reverence for human ingenuity. My mind feels alive, spurred by the visible evidence of continuous learning and collaboration.
